About

I design for humans
behind screens.

I'm Oluwatobi Oyesola , a Product Designer who believes the best interfaces disappear. They stop being interfaces and become experiences people simply live inside.

My work sits at the intersection of design thinking and human psychology. I thrive on complexity, taking tangled problems and returning clarity. Whether mapping user journeys or polishing final pixels, I hold both the big picture and the fine details with equal rigour.

Figma Design Systems User Research Prototyping IA Mapping Accessibility Usability Testing
"Good design doesn't shout,
it guides."
01
Empathy First

Every screen represents a real person with real goals. I start with understanding before I start designing.

02
Systems Thinking

Great design scales. I build with components and principles so every new screen inherits the work done before it.

03
Impact by Clarity

Complexity is the enemy of adoption. My measure of success is not how clever the design is, but how effortlessly it works.

How I Work

A process built on
rigour and craft.

Every decision is traceable back to a user insight, a business goal, or a validated assumption. This is what separates decoration from design.

01
Discover & Define

Stakeholder interviews, user research, competitive audits. This phase transforms vague briefs into sharp problem statements.

User Interviews Competitive Analysis Problem Framing
→
02
Ideate & Architect

Information architecture, user flows, and low-fidelity wireframes that test logic before investing in pixels.

User Flows Wireframing IA Mapping
→
03
Design & Refine

High-fidelity design built on a robust component system. Typography, colour, spacing, motion. Every detail calibrated for user and brand.

Design Systems Visual Design Interaction Design
→
04
Test & Ship

Usability testing, iteration on findings, then dev handoff with thorough documentation. I stay close through development. Design doesn't end at delivery.

Usability Testing Prototype Validation Dev Handoff
→

I've worked with.

"

Oyesola Oluwatobi is an exceptional UI/UX designer who truly understands the art of creating user-friendly and visually stunning designs. Her attention to detail, creativity, and ability to translate vision into seamless digital experience exceeded our expectations.

Oyekanmi Tosin
Client
"

Working alongside Oyesola Oluwatobi has been an inspiring experience. Her creativity, user-focused approach, and knack for problem-solving set her apart. She consistently delivers innovative designs that elevate projects to the next level.

Dada Oladimeji
Product Designer
"

Tobi was a dependable and supportive member of the design team. She consistently showed a strong willingness to learn and improve, and she approached her work with a positive, open mindset. While still growing in her craft, she was always helpful, receptive to feedback, and eager to contribute wherever needed. Working with her was seamless and almost natural because she took on the team spirit fast. She’s a great addition to any team.

Abayomi Tosin
Design Team lead, Product Studion Limited
"

Working with Tobi’s designs was an incredibly smooth experience. As a frontend developer, I found her layouts well structured, easy to interpret, and highly practical to implement. Every detail felt intentional, which made the development process seamless. Beyond functionality, her designs are visually appealing and user focused, making it easy to bring them to life exactly as envisioned.

David Wusu
Front-end Developer, Product Studio Limited
"

Tobi brings a rare balance of creativity and product thinking to her work. She doesn’t just design screens, she thinks deeply about user journeys, edge cases, and how each interaction supports the overall product vision. Throughout our collaboration, she consistently asked the right questions, challenged assumptions when needed, and delivered solutions that were both thoughtful and scalable. Her ability to connect user needs with business goals made her a valuable part of the product process.

Aisha Aderinsola
Product Manager, Product Studio Limited.
